items.question: Does it work with HomePod mini?
items.answer: Yes. OwnTone discovers HomePod and HomePod mini models as AirPlay 2 outputs. They must be reachable from the server on the same network or through correctly routed mDNS.

items.question: Can I choose individual speakers?
items.answer: Yes. Select any combination of discovered AirPlay speakers or automatically include every available output. Volume is configurable as well.

items.question: Will it interrupt music?
items.answer: It can. OwnTone temporarily takes over the selected AirPlay outputs for the duration of the chime and restores its previous output selection and volume afterward.

items.question: Do I need HomeKit?
items.answer: No. The custom chime works through Ring and OwnTone. An optional virtual HomeKit doorbell can be enabled separately for Apple's standard chime.

items.question: Is this an official Ring or Apple product?
items.answer: No. It is an independent open-source project. The Ring connection uses an unofficial API, so future changes by Ring may require an app update.
